heading: Advance payments
label: 5532 Advance payments
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 95c of this titleSection is from the Congressional Operations Appropriations Act, 1998, which is title I of the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 1998.

Change of NameCommittee on House Oversight of House of Representatives changed to Committee on House Administration of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 5, One Hundred Sixth Congress, .Jan. 6, 1999

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: For fiscal year 1998 and each succeeding fiscal year, the Chief Administrative Officer of the House of Representatives is authorized to make advance payments under a contract or other agreement to provide a service or deliver an article for the United States Government without regard to the provisions of .section 3324 of title 31

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: b Regulations
children.text: An advance payment authorized by subsection (a) shall be made in accordance with regulations issued by the Committee on House Oversight of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: c Effective date
children.text: The authority granted by subsection (a) shall not take effect until regulations are issued pursuant to subsection (b).
